div.p: PROVIDER-AGNOSTIC LLM · AGENTIC TOOL LOOP · DESKTOP/COMPUTER USE · TYPESTATE POLICY GATE · BRAINCTL MEMORY

g.title: src/orchestrator.ts — in-process intervals (dev) · migrate to a queue when prod needs it
OAuth 2.0 PKCE · Basic tier 10k posts/mo · no follow endpoint · refresh tokens rotate every call
Adapter selected by LLM_PROVIDER env. xAI · OpenAI-compatible · Anthropic · Gemini. Each declares capabilities — loops degrade gracefully on missing features.

div.p: — XAI · GROK-4.20-REASONING X_SEARCH · WEB_SEARCH · MCP · BATCH · CACHE · PREV_RESPONSE_ID — OPENAI-COMPAT · GPT-5 / OLLAMA / GROQ / TOGETHER CHAT COMPLETIONS · BATCH · AUTO CACHE — ANTHROPIC · CLAUDE-OPUS-4-7 MESSAGES · WEB_SEARCH · MCP · CACHE_CONTROL — GEMINI · GEMINI-2.5-PRO GOOGLE_SEARCH · CODE_EXECUTION · AUTO CACHE

g.title: Dual surface: remote MCP (HTTP/SSE) for the LLM provider with READ allowlist · local stdio MCP for TS-direct writes

div.p: READ ALLOWLIST (LLM) MEMORY_SEARCH · ENTITY_GET · ENTITY_SEARCH CONTEXT_SEARCH · TOM_PERSPECTIVE_GET POLICY_MATCH · REASON · TEMPORAL_*
+ CONSOLIDATOR WRITES REFLEXION_WRITE · DREAM_CYCLE CONSOLIDATION_RUN · GAPS_SCAN RETIREMENT_ANALYSIS
NEVER EXPOSED MEMORY_ADD · ENTITY_CREATE · EVENT_ADD BELIEF_SET · POLICY_ADD · TRUST_*
SINGLETON SWITCH ON LLM_PROVIDER VALIDATES PER-PROVIDER API KEY LOGS CAPABILITIES AT BOOT TESTS: _RESETLLMFORTESTS()

PROVIDER-AGNOSTIC TOOL-CALL ITERATION MERGES LOCALTOOLS + SERVER TOOLS + MCP CHAT → EXECUTE TOOL LOCALLY → RE-CHAT CAP VIA MAXITERATIONS (DEFAULT 10) DISPATCHES COMPUTER_USE CALLS TO COMPUTEREXECUTOR (NOOPEXECUTOR DEFAULT) FULL TRACE + SUMMED USAGE RETURNED
NOOPEXECUTOR (DEFAULT) — SHADOW-MODE, LOGS INTENT, NEVER TOUCHES THE HOST

DOCKEREXECUTOR (IMPLEMENTED) — REAL SANDBOX XVFB + FLUXBOX + X11VNC + XDOTOOL + SCROT VIA DOCKER EXEC. MARKSAFE() GATE REQUIRED BEFORE GATED/LIVE USE. 16 KB BASH CAP, 64 KB STDOUT TRUNCATION, ARGV-ONLY INJECTION (NO SHELL INTERPOLATION).
SCREENSHOT · CLICK · TYPE · KEY · SCROLL BASH · TEXTEDITOR · CURSORPOSITION · WAIT
EVERY 120 S SRC/LOOPS/PERCEIVER.TS
• OWN MENTIONS (SINCEID) • HOME TIMELINE • DM EVENTS • NO EXTERNAL SCOUTING
EVERY 300 S · PROVIDER-AGNOSTIC SRC/LOOPS/REASONER.TS
READS LAST 50 PERCEIVED_EVENTS EMITS UP TO 10 CANDIDATEENVELOPE[]
LLM().CHAT({ MESSAGES, TOOLS, STRUCTUREDOUTPUT }) PROMPTCACHEKEY: STRAND:REASONER:V1 MAXTURNS: 5 · TOOLS FROM CAPABILITIES.SERVERSIDETOOLS SCHEMA: ANYOF PER ACTION.KIND
STUCK-MID-THOUGHT → RETRY WITH PREVIOUSRESPONSEID (WHEN SUPPORTED)
1 BANNED_TOPIC 2 PREFILTER (REGEX+TOPIC+EMBEDDING) 3 RATE CAPS (DAY + HOUR) 4 COOLDOWNS (PER-TARGET) 5 RELEVANCE ≥ 0.65 6 DUP COS < 0.85 (7D) 7 DIVERSITY (CLUSTER + KIND) 8 DM MUTUAL REQUIRED
MINTS CANDIDATE<"APPROVED">
EVENT-DRIVEN · SHADOW/GATED/LIVE SRC/LOOPS/ACTOR.TS
ACCEPTS ONLY CANDIDATE<"APPROVED">

ol.li: DISPATCH PER ACTION.KIND LIKE · BOOKMARK · POST · REPLY · QUOTE · DM FOLLOW/UNFOLLOW (PRO GATED)

div.p: 5 TASK JSONL VIA LLM.FILESUPLOAD → BATCHCREATE IF CAPABILITIES.BATCH — ELSE SYNC FALLBACK
TASKS: DREAM_CYCLE · CONSOLIDATION_RUN GAPS_SCAN · RETIREMENT_ANALYSIS REFLEXION_WRITE
SRC/DB/SCHEMA.SQL
ACTION_LOG IDEMPOTENCY_KEY UK COOLDOWNS · RATE_COUNTERS REASONER_RUNS · CONSOLIDATOR_RUNS POST_EMBEDDINGS (7D DUP WINDOW) PERCEIVED_EVENTS · DLQ HUMAN_REVIEW_QUEUE

• TYPESTATE GATE · REASONER VIA RUNAGENTICLOOP • 4 ADAPTERS: OPENAI-COMPAT · ANTHROPIC · XAI · GEMINI • LLM() FACTORY + CAPABILITIES-DRIVEN FEATURES • RUNAGENTICLOOP — LOCAL TOOL-CALL ITERATION RUNNER • COMPUTER-USE TOOL TYPE + ANTHROPIC NATIVE MAPPING • NOOPEXECUTOR + REAL DOCKEREXECUTOR (XVFB + XDOTOOL + SCROT VIA DOCKER EXEC) • CONSOLIDATOR: XAI/OPENAI FILE BATCH · ANTHROPIC INLINE BATCH · SYNC FALLBACK (GEMINI) — ALL THROUGH HASBATCH / HASINLINEBATCH / HASBATCHPOLL GUARDS • CONSOLIDATORPOLL WIRED (30 MIN) • MULTI-TURN MESSAGE HISTORY NATIVE ON XAI • 177 TESTS · SMOKE 281 MS · TYPECHECK+BIOME CLEAN

• X V2 LIVE WRITES ON REAL CREDS (PHASE 3) • OAUTH SETUP + BOOTSTRAP-MEMORY RUNS • GROKCOMPOSE OPT-IN (TWO-STAGE COMPOSER) • DOCKER IMAGE STRAND-SANDBOX:LATEST BUILD • LABEL 100 CANDIDATES · ≥ 80% SHADOW AGREEMENT • PHASE 7: PRO TIER → FOLLOW VARIANT LIVE • GEMINI BATCH API (VERTEX PATH)

• DMS TO NON-MUTUALS • ACTION BYPASSING THE POLICY GATE • BRAINCTL MUTATIONS VIA REMOTE MCP • PROMPTS AS INLINE STRINGS • PROVIDER-SPECIFIC LEAKAGE OUTSIDE SRC/CLIENTS/LLM/ • FOLLOW VARIANT ON BASIC TIER
